title: gompholobium muticum
intro: Gompholobium muticum, also known as the prickly flax or bush flax, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Gompholobium muticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from minor skin irritations and infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support skin health and well-being.
